settings.title: Bloom
settings.copy: Wet the grounds and let them swell. This releases trapped gas so the pour extracts evenly.

settings.title: Pour
settings.copy: Pour in slow spirals, keeping the bed level. Aim for a 1:16 coffee-to-water ratio.

settings.title: Rest
settings.copy: Let it draw down completely, then give it a minute off the dripper. Flavors open as it cools.

settings.question: How fresh is the coffee when it arrives?
settings.answer: We roast Tuesdays and ship the same week, so most bags land within days of the roast date printed on the label.

settings.question: Can you grind it for me?
settings.answer: Yes — choose whole bean, or a grind for pour-over, drip, French press, or espresso at checkout. Whole bean stays fresh longest.

settings.question: Do you roast a decaf?
settings.answer: We do. Our decaf is a sugarcane-process Colombian, roasted on the same schedule as everything else — no dusty back-shelf beans.
